curation.synopsis: Sergeant Khorak of the Deathshroud should already be dead, but the breaking of his Legion at Isstvan has left him drifting at the edge of the Imperium with a handful of equally lost Death Guard, raiding what little falls within reach. The hunt finds him before the Imperium does: a band of warriors in crudely overpainted black armour, led by another disowned son of Mortarion — the Blackshield Crysos Morturg. What follows is less a war between two sides of the Heresy than a private reckoning between two answers to the same question: what does a Death Guard become when his Legion no longer wants him? A short, hard-edged introduction to one of the Heresy's most enigmatic renegade captains.

flags.reason: the raid and confrontation are set on unnamed fringe worlds at the edge of the Imperium; no concrete planet or system is identified in accessible summaries.
